creator: spf@g-service.ru
text:
jb# mount
/dev/mfid0s1a on / (ufs, local)
devfs on /dev (devfs, local)
/dev/mfid0s1d on /usr (ufs, local, soft-updates)
/dev/mfid0s1e on /var (ufs, local, soft-updates)
ZFS on /usr/local (zfs, local)

jb#portinstall java/openjdk6
..
..
